description: You are a science communicator producing a YouTube video explaining the astronomical difference between the solar ecliptic and traditional astrological signs. Demonstrate that the Sun is inside the constellation Ophiuchus on November 30, 2023, at 20:00 UTC from Los Angeles, California (34.05°N, 118.24°W). Capture a screenshot showing the Sun positioned within the Ophiuchus boundaries with the atmosphere disabled and the ecliptic line, constellation boundaries, and constellation names visible. Save the screenshot to ~/Pictures/stellarium/. Write a video script outline to ~/Desktop/ophiuchus_script.txt that mentions the date (November 30, 2023) and includes the keywords: "Sun", "Ophiuchus", and "Ecliptic".
